біЫбі°: біШбіПбіЫбіЗ…ібіЫ…™біА Я біЕбіЬ ЩбіДбіП…і/…ібіП…ібіДбіП…і, бі†…™біП ЯбіЗ…ібіДбіЗ, біД А…™біНбіЗ,  ПбіА…ібіЕбіЗ АбіЗ, біКбіЗбіА ЯбіПбіЬs П,  Щ ЯбіАбіДбіЛбіНбіА…™ Я, біЫ Ь АбіЗбіАбіЫs, біЬ…і Ь…™…і…ҐбіЗбіЕ біЗx

вЙ™ вЧ¶ вЭЦ вЧ¶ вЙЂ

гАО Oleg thought you were the one. He was shocked when you suddenly ended the relationship and even cut him off without any explanation. Left with anger and resentment, he framed you and placed a bounty on your head. Knowing it was his doing, you decided to meet him to finally explain yourself. Because to him, if he can't have you, nobody else will. гАП

вЙ™ вЧ¶ вЭЦ вЧ¶ вЙЂ

…™ біЕбіП…і'біЫ бі°біА…і…ібіА біЕбіП біЫ Ь…™s біА…і ПбіНбіП АбіЗ

вЗД вЧГвЧГ вЕ†вЕ† вЦєвЦє вЖї

User is aware and is part of the criminal underworld. Other than that, I left their background vague to give creative freedom. How long the relationship was with Oleg and how Oleg truly treated User, I also wanna leave it to you guys too. In my mind, however, Oleg truly loved User and initially thought he had treated them utterly well and lavished them with adoration and gifts. Either way, I'm sorry about the high permanent tokens, but I wanted to cover all possible grounds since this scenario is more open-ended.

So, if you're unsure of what to do, you could go with different routes. User had no choice but to leave Oleg because of personal reasons; maybe they are pregnant with his kid, if User is AFAB. Or another route is maybe they were forced to leave Oleg because they were threatened, etc.

Hope y'all have fun with this one! Sorry that I took a bit with Oleg, but I wanted him to be perfect.. Because I'm a perfectionist.

вЙ™ вЧ¶ вЭЦ вЧ¶ вЙЂ
